content.content:
1→import {Platform, TextStyle} from 'react-native';
     2→
     3→// Font family constants matching web app's four typefaces
     4→export const fonts = {
     5→  // UI text, buttons, labels (maps to web --font-ui: "Outfit")
     6→  ui: {
     7→    regular: Platform.select({ios: 'Outfit-Regular', android: 'Outfit-Regular'}) ?? 'Outfit-Regular',
     8→    medium: Platform.select({ios: 'Outfit-Medium', android: 'Outfit-Medium'}) ?? 'Outfit-Medium',
     9→    semiBold: Platform.select({ios: 'Outfit-SemiBold', android: 'Outfit-SemiBold'}) ?? 'Outfit-SemiBold',
    10→    bold: Platform.select({ios: 'Outfit-Bold', android: 'Outfit-Bold'}) ?? 'Outfit-Bold',
    11→  },
    12→  // Body/reading content (maps to web --font-serif: "Lora")
    13→  serif: {
    14→    regular: Platform.select({ios: 'Lora-Regular', android: 'Lora-Regular'}) ?? 'Lora-Regular',
    15→    italic: Platform.select({ios: 'Lora-Italic', android: 'Lora-Italic'}) ?? 'Lora-Italic',
    16→    bold: Platform.select({ios: 'Lora-Bold', android: 'Lora-Bold'}) ?? 'Lora-Bold',
    17→  },
    18→  // Post titles, headings (maps to web "Lexend Deca")
    19→  heading: {
    20→    semiBold: Platform.select({ios: 'LexendDeca-SemiBold', android: 'LexendDeca-SemiBold'}) ?? 'LexendDeca-SemiBold',
    21→    bold: Platform.select({ios: 'LexendDeca-Bold', android: 'LexendDeca-Bold'}) ?? 'LexendDeca-Bold',
    22→  },
    23→  // Brand "iskrib" logo text (maps to web "Playfair Display")
    24→  brand: {
    25→    semiBold: Platform.select({ios: 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBold', android: 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBold'}) ?? 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBold',
    26→    semiBoldItalic: Platform.select({ios: 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBoldItalic', android: 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBoldItalic'}) ?? 'PlayfairDisplay-SemiBoldItalic',
    27→  },
    28→} as const;
    29→
    30→// Type scale presets
    31→export const typeScale = {
    32→  // Brand logo (Playfair Display)
    33→  hero: {
    34→    fontFamily: fonts.brand.semiBold,
    35→    fontSize: 32,
    36→    lineHeight: 40,
    37→    letterSpacing: 0.5,
    38→  } as TextStyle,
    39→
    40→  // Page headings (Lexend Deca)
    41→  h1: {
    42→    fontFamily: fonts.heading.bold,
    43→    fontSize: 24,
    44→    lineHeight: 32,
    45→    letterSpacing: -0.2,
    46→  } as TextStyle,
    47→
    48→  h2: {
    49→    fontFamily: fonts.heading.semiBold,
    50→    fontSize: 20,
    51→    lineHeight: 28,
    52→    letterSpacing: -0.1,
    53→  } as TextStyle,
    54→
    55→  h3: {
    56→    fontFamily: fonts.heading.semiBold,
    57→    fontSize: 17,
    58→    lineHeight: 24,
    59→  } as TextStyle,
    60→
    61→  // Post titles in cards (Lexend Deca)
    62→  cardTitle: {
    63→    fontFamily: fonts.heading.bold,
    64→    fontSize: 15,
    65→    lineHeight: 21,
    66→  } as TextStyle,
    67→
    68→  // Body text (Lora serif)
    69→  body: {
    70→    fontFamily: fonts.serif.regular,
    71→    fontSize: 16,
    72→    lineHeight: 26,
    73→  } as TextStyle,
    74→
    75→  bodySmall: {
    76→    fontFamily: fonts.serif.regular,
    77→    fontSize: 14,
    78→    lineHeight: 22,
    79→  } as TextStyle,
    80→
    81→  // UI text (Outfit)
    82→  ui: {
    83→    fontFamily: fonts.ui.regular,
    84→    fontSize: 15,
    85→    lineHeight: 22,
    86→  } as TextStyle,
    87→
    88→  uiMedium: {
    89→    fontFamily: fonts.ui.medium,
    90→    fontSize: 15,
    91→    lineHeight: 22,
    92→  } as TextStyle,
    93→
    94→  // Captions and small text (Outfit)
    95→  caption: {
    96→    fontFamily: fonts.ui.regular,
    97→    fontSize: 12,
    98→    lineHeight: 16,
    99→    letterSpacing: 0.2,
   100→  } as TextStyle,
   101→
   102→  // Labels (Outfit uppercase)
   103→  label: {
   104→    fontFamily: fonts.ui.semiBold,
   105→    fontSize: 11,
   106→    lineHeight: 14,
   107→    letterSpacing: 1,
   108→    textTransform: 'uppercase',
   109→  } as TextStyle,
   110→

   124→  } as TextStyle,
   125→

   132→} as const;
